markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Colorado and San Francisco go to extra innings in the Colorado vs San Francisco professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 4:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will there be extra innings in the Colorado vs San Francisco game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 4:05 PM EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If San Francisco wins the Colorado vs San Francisco professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 4:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Colorado vs San Francisco professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 4:05 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
markets.title: Colorado vs San Francisco Winner?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Luke Raley records 5+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Seattle vs Miami professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 8, 2026 at 6:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Luke Raley is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Luke Raley starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Luke Raley is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Luke Raley is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Luke Raley: 5+ hits + runs + RBIs?
